title: PROTECTIVE SERVICES - 211info
text: THE HARBOR PROTECTIVE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, and/or stalking obtain legal protection. 801 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Age 14 or older Hours: Advocacy Office: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-4pm, Wednesday 9am-noon, closed 1st Wednesday of every month. Online Chat and Text: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (503) 325-5735 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (503) 325-5735 Support Administration (503) 325-3426 Español (855) 938-0584 Support Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website information and for online chat support. Advocates are mobile and can meet with survivors in safe, public locations. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Approximately 3 blocks from Sunset Empire Transit Center. Found in the lower level of the building. Services: Protective/Restraining Orders Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY SHELTER INFORMATION SERVICES - THE HARBOR MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE HARBOR
